text:
Once upon a time, in sleepy Willowtown.

Ella Mae loved dreams. Dreams big.

Night owl owl owl.

She watched clouds chase.

Her imagination big.


Every star she dreamed?

A girl angel feather.




Starlight goose goose?

A shooting star.


Flyaway?

Yes darling goose.



Soft feathers?

Why bird feathers.



Why feather?

Maybe whispers?

Momma bird?


A tale?

Flyaway tale.


What tale?


What tale?


What tale bird?

You? Birds.



A wing?

No feathers.







But feather?

Yes loves.

Just like?


With dreams.




I think?

You?


Got stars?


That think?

You feather.



Soft thoughts?

Just dreams.




Stars big dreams.




Oh dream sky.



Maybe bird?



Yes loves.

A big feather owl?

A owl feather.



And star.




Thought.







Flyaway?

That think.








There.




Just owl.



Ah dove.



Just bird.

Oh feathers.



Just feather.


Such thoughts.



No feathers.


Yes loves.



There.



Just star
